top_signals.title: Warsh Fed holds rates steady. Trump says 'It's all right. Whatever.' - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Warsh Fed holds rates steady. Trump says 'It's all right. Whatever.'  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
top_signals.summary: Five Amazon employees testified at Seattle City Council meetings where officials sought feedback on a year-long data center new construction pause.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ethereum Foundation leadership exodus continues with director’s departure
top_signals.summary: Hsiao-Wei Wang’s departure adds to a wave of Ethereum Foundation exits, fueling debate over governance, decentralization and the network’s future.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Rep. Steil introduces bill to block lawmakers from placing prediction markets bets on public policy issues
top_signals.summary: Rep. Bryan Steil introduced legislation aimed at preventing lawmakers and their families from profiting from bets on political outcomes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
